name: io.github.AgiMaulana/HuaweiAppGalleryMcp
description: Huawei AppGallery Connect MCP: upload APK/AAB, update metadata, submit and manage app releases.

environmentVariables.name: HUAWEI_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Huawei AppGallery Connect API Client ID (AGC Console → Users & Permissions → API key → Connect API)

environmentVariables.name: HUAWEI_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Huawei AppGallery Connect API Client Secret

environmentVariables.name: HUAWEI_APP_ID
environmentVariables.description: Default App ID — when set, all tools can omit the app_id argument
